rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks scoped to the owning component declaration
Use assume/guarantee syntax for component type contracts with visible inputs/outputs
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference only visible features and declared variables
Implementation contracts use assign for output bindings, not guarantees
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks use assume "label": expression; guarantee "label": expression; format
Component type scopes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
